channel.title: Streaming on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Streaming on Arrans github.io

item.title: louisgv/local.ai
item.description: 🎒 local.ai - Run AI locally on your PC!

item.title: AlexxIT/go2rtc
item.description: Ultimate camera streaming application with support RTSP, RTMP, HTTP-FLV, WebRTC, MSE, HLS, MP4, MJPEG, HomeKit, FFmpeg, etc.

item.title: ReactiveX/RxGo
item.description: Reactive Extensions for the Go language.

item.title: rstemmer/musicdb
item.description: 🎧 A music manager with focus on remote access to your music by having a WebUI and providing an audio stream.
